Product Details
PTFE Seal Rings

Low-friction sealing rings with broad chemical resistance for static, reciprocating, and selected rotary applications.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

PTFE Seal Rings

A suitable option for aggressive media, high cleanliness requirements, and applications sensitive to friction.

CHX PTFE Seal Rings focus on low friction, dimensional stability, and media compatibility, making them practical for equipment that must balance sealing reliability with smooth movement.

Low Friction

Helps reduce drag and supports smoother motion in dynamic or precision assemblies.

Broad Compatibility

Suitable for many chemicals, solvents, and process media where elastomer options are limited.

Clean Applications

A practical choice for equipment that values clean operation and stable surface behavior.
